note: Implemented parse_interface_section() with decode_key() helper. Added base64 0.22 dependency. Parses PrivateKey (base64→[u8;32]), ListenPort (u16), Address (comma-sep CIDR→Vec<IpNet>), DNS (comma-sep→Vec<IpAddr>). Returns ConfigError::ParseError with line numbers for unrecognized keys/malformed values, MissingField for absent [Interface] or PrivateKey. 16 tests added, all 65 tests pass.
